sentence pronunciation: zhè jiān lǚguǎn jù huǒchēzhàn zhǐyǒu wǔ fēnzhōng lùchéng, duì lǚkè hěn fāngbiàn.
sentence meaning: This hotel is only five minutes from the train station, which is convenient for travelers.

example sentence: 她拒絕了那份薪水很高的工作，因為工時太長。
sentence pronunciation: tā jùjué le nà fèn xīnshuǐ hěn gāo de gōngzuò, yīnwèi gōngshí tài cháng.
sentence meaning: She turned down that high-paying job because the working hours were too long.

example sentence: 從我家到公司距離不遠，但是早上塞車時仍然要花四十分鐘。
sentence pronunciation: cóng wǒ jiā dào gōngsī jùlí bù yuǎn, dànshì zǎoshàng sāichē shí réngrán yào huā sìshí fēnzhōng.
sentence meaning: The distance from my home to the office is not far, but it still takes forty minutes when there is morning traffic.

example sentence: 演員拿到劇本後，先標出自己不熟悉的台詞。
sentence pronunciation: yǎnyuán ná dào jùběn hòu, xiān biāo chū zìjǐ bù shúxī de táicí.
sentence meaning: After receiving the script, the actor first marked the lines he was unfamiliar with.

example sentence: 這部影集的劇情一開始很慢，第三集以後才變得緊張。
sentence pronunciation: zhè bù yǐngjí de jùqíng yì kāishǐ hěn màn, dì sān jí yǐhòu cái biàn de jǐnzhāng.
sentence meaning: The plot of this series is slow at first and only becomes tense after the third episode.

example sentence: 這座城市具有多元文化特色，街上可以看到不同語言的招牌。
sentence pronunciation: zhè zuò chéngshì jùyǒu duōyuán wénhuà tèsè, jiē shàng kěyǐ kàndào bùtóng yǔyán de zhāopái.
sentence meaning: This city has multicultural characteristics, and you can see signs in different languages on the streets.

example sentence: 這家餐廳的座位很少，週末去的話絕對要先訂位。
sentence pronunciation: zhè jiā cāntīng de zuòwèi hěn shǎo, zhōumò qù de huà juéduì yào xiān dìng wèi.
sentence meaning: This restaurant has very few seats, so if you go on the weekend, you definitely need to reserve first.

example sentence: 在這個計畫裡，每個人的角色都很清楚，所以合作起來比較順利。
sentence pronunciation: zài zhège jìhuà lǐ, měi ge rén de juésè dōu hěn qīngchǔ, suǒyǐ hézuò qǐlái bǐjiào shùnlì.
sentence meaning: In this project, everyone's role is clear, so cooperation goes more smoothly.

example sentence: 災害發生後，軍隊協助運送物資到交通中斷的村莊。
sentence pronunciation: zāihài fāshēng hòu, jūnduì xiézhù yùnsòng wùzī dào jiāotōng zhōngduàn de cūnzhuāng.
sentence meaning: After the disaster, the military helped transport supplies to villages where transportation was cut off.

example sentence: 那位軍人退伍後回到家鄉，開了一間小書店。
sentence pronunciation: nà wèi jūnrén tuìwǔ hòu huí dào jiāxiāng, kāi le yì jiān xiǎo shūdiàn.
sentence meaning: After leaving the military, that soldier returned to his hometown and opened a small bookstore.

example sentence: 這條路太窄，大型卡車進來時需要有人在旁邊指揮。
sentence pronunciation: zhè tiáo lù tài zhǎi, dàxíng kǎchē jìn lái shí xūyào yǒu rén zài pángbiān zhǐhuī.
sentence meaning: This road is too narrow, so when a large truck comes in, someone needs to guide it from the side.

example sentence: 圖書館晚上開放到十點，方便下班後想讀書的人。
sentence pronunciation: túshūguǎn wǎnshàng kāifàng dào shí diǎn, fāngbiàn xiàbān hòu xiǎng dúshū de rén.
sentence meaning: The library is open until ten at night, which is convenient for people who want to study after work.

example sentence: 春天一到，公園裡的木棉花就開始開花，整條路都變亮了。
sentence pronunciation: chūntiān yí dào, gōngyuán lǐ de mùmiánhuā jiù kāishǐ kāihuā, zhěng tiáo lù dōu biàn liàng le.
sentence meaning: Once spring arrives, the kapok trees in the park begin to bloom, and the whole road brightens up.

example sentence: 她個性開朗，很快就和新同事聊熟了。
sentence pronunciation: tā gèxìng kāilǎng, hěn kuài jiù hé xīn tóngshì liáo shú le.
sentence meaning: She has a cheerful personality and quickly became comfortable chatting with her new coworkers.

example sentence: 課程開始以前，老師先請大家分享自己的學習目標。
sentence pronunciation: kèchéng kāishǐ yǐqián, lǎoshī xiān qǐng dàjiā fēnxiǎng zìjǐ de xuéxí mùbiāo.
sentence meaning: Before the course begins, the teacher first asks everyone to share their learning goals.

example sentence: 不要因為別人的工作不一樣就看不起人，每種工作都有它的價值。
sentence pronunciation: bú yào yīnwèi biérén de gōngzuò bù yíyàng jiù kànbùqǐ rén, měi zhǒng gōngzuò dōu yǒu tā de jiàzhí.
sentence meaning: Do not look down on people just because their jobs are different; every kind of work has its value.

example sentence: 院子裡種了三棵檸檬樹，夏天可以自己做檸檬茶。
sentence pronunciation: yuànzi lǐ zhòng le sān kē níngméng shù, xiàtiān kěyǐ zìjǐ zuò níngméng chá.
sentence meaning: Three lemon trees were planted in the yard, so we can make our own lemon tea in summer.

example sentence: 他大學念的是外文科，後來卻進入科技公司工作。
sentence pronunciation: tā dàxué niàn de shì wàiwén kē, hòulái què jìnrù kējì gōngsī gōngzuò.
sentence meaning: He studied in the foreign languages department at university, but later entered a technology company.

example sentence: 科技讓遠距工作更方便，也改變了很多公司的管理方式。
sentence pronunciation: kējì ràng yuǎnjù gōngzuò gèng fāngbiàn, yě gǎibiàn le hěn duō gōngsī de guǎnlǐ fāngshì.
sentence meaning: Technology makes remote work more convenient and has also changed how many companies manage work.

example sentence: 科學研究需要耐心，因為一個結果常常要反覆確認。
sentence pronunciation: kēxué yánjiù xūyào nàixīn, yīnwèi yí ge jiéguǒ chángcháng yào fǎnfù quèrèn.
sentence meaning: Scientific research requires patience because one result often needs to be confirmed repeatedly.

example sentence: 這份資料可供參考，但不能完全取代專家的判斷。
sentence pronunciation: zhè fèn zīliào kě gōng cānkǎo, dàn bù néng wánquán qǔdài zhuānjiā de pànduàn.
sentence meaning: This information may be used for reference, but it cannot completely replace an expert's judgment.

example sentence: 如果消息來源不可靠，我們最好不要立刻分享出去。
sentence pronunciation: rúguǒ xiāoxí láiyuán bù kěkào, wǒmen zuìhǎo bú yào lìkè fēnxiǎng chūqù.
sentence meaning: If the source of the information is not reliable, we had better not share it immediately.

example sentence: 那個迷路的小孩看起來很可憐，警察帶他到服務台等家人。
sentence pronunciation: nà ge mílù de xiǎohái kàn qǐlái hěn kělián, jǐngchá dài tā dào fúwùtái děng jiārén.
sentence meaning: That lost child looked pitiful, so a police officer took him to the service desk to wait for his family.

meaning: to long for; to desire deeply
example sentence: 很多年輕人渴望有自己的空間，但房租讓他們很有壓力。
sentence pronunciation: hěn duō niánqīngrén kěwàng yǒu zìjǐ de kōngjiān, dàn fángzū ràng tāmen hěn yǒu yālì.
sentence meaning: Many young people long for their own space, but rent puts a lot of pressure on them.

example sentence: 車站附近的機車亂停，真的很可惡，行人常常被迫走到馬路上。
sentence pronunciation: chēzhàn fùjìn de jīchē luàn tíng, zhēn de hěn kěwù, xíngrén chángcháng bèi pò zǒu dào mǎlù shàng.
sentence meaning: The scooters parked randomly near the station are really annoying; pedestrians are often forced to walk onto the road.

example sentence: 這份表格可以線上填寫，也可以到櫃台拿紙本。
sentence pronunciation: zhè fèn biǎogé kěyǐ xiànshàng tiánxiě, yě kěyǐ dào guìtái ná zhǐběn.
sentence meaning: This form can be filled out online, or you can get a paper copy at the counter.

example sentence: 火車七點一刻開，請你至少提前十分鐘到月台。
sentence pronunciation: huǒchē qī diǎn yí kè kāi, qǐng nǐ zhìshǎo tíqián shí fēnzhōng dào yuètái.
sentence meaning: The train leaves at a quarter past seven, so please arrive at the platform at least ten minutes early.

example sentence: 這個食譜需要兩百克麵粉和一顆雞蛋。
sentence pronunciation: zhège shípǔ xūyào liǎngbǎi kè miànfěn hé yì kē jīdàn.
sentence meaning: This recipe needs two hundred grams of flour and one egg.

example sentence: 這門課程除了文法以外，還安排了很多口語討論。
sentence pronunciation: zhè mén kèchéng chúle wénfǎ yǐwài, hái ānpái le hěn duō kǒuyǔ tǎolùn.
sentence meaning: This course includes many speaking discussions in addition to grammar.

example sentence: 在課堂上犯錯沒有關係，重要的是願意開口練習。
sentence pronunciation: zài kètáng shàng fàncuò méiyǒu guānxi, zhòngyào de shì yuànyì kāikǒu liànxí.
sentence meaning: It is okay to make mistakes in class; what matters is being willing to speak and practice.

example sentence: 老師請學生先看課文，再用自己的話說明作者的想法。
sentence pronunciation: lǎoshī qǐng xuéshēng xiān kàn kèwén, zài yòng zìjǐ de huà shuōmíng zuòzhě de xiǎngfǎ.
sentence meaning: The teacher asked students to read the text first and then explain the author's ideas in their own words.

example sentence: 他花了很長時間才克服上台說話的緊張感。
sentence pronunciation: tā huā le hěn cháng shíjiān cái kèfú shàng tái shuōhuà de jǐnzhāng gǎn.
sentence meaning: It took him a long time to overcome his nervousness about speaking on stage.

example sentence: 只要你肯花時間練習，發音一定會慢慢進步。
sentence pronunciation: zhǐyào nǐ kěn huā shíjiān liànxí, fāyīn yídìng huì mànmàn jìnbù.
sentence meaning: As long as you are willing to spend time practicing, your pronunciation will definitely improve gradually.

example sentence: 主管肯定了她的努力，並請她負責下一個專案。
sentence pronunciation: zhǔguǎn kěndìng le tā de nǔlì, bìng qǐng tā fùzé xià yí ge zhuān'àn.
sentence meaning: The manager affirmed her effort and asked her to take charge of the next project.

example sentence: 這間公寓雖然不大，但收納設計很好，所以空間很夠用。
sentence pronunciation: zhè jiān gōngyù suīrán bú dà, dàn shōunà shèjì hěn hǎo, suǒyǐ kōngjiān hěn gòu yòng.
sentence meaning: Although this apartment is not large, the storage design is good, so the space is quite sufficient.
